re_line: Jane W. Noe for Quinn K. Poe 5 M.R.S. § 213(1-A) — Drew Q. Public
matter_description: the renovation of the kitchen of her home at 9 Drew L. Poe, Saco, Maine, contracted primarily for personal, family and household purposes
unfair_practice_description: accepting a $9,800 consumer deposit against a promised eight-week kitchen renovation, abandoning the work after two days of demolition, refusing any refund, and continuing to represent to my client that the work remained on schedule.
injury_description: the loss of the $9,800 deposit, the cost of repairing and completing the demolition-damaged kitchen, and the loss of use of the kitchen since March 2026.

demand_kind.detail: attorney classified the transaction as a consumer (personal/family/household-purpose) purchase covered by the UTPA private right, 5 M.R.S. § 213(1); coverage is never inferred by the template
